title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 10–13, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I won't kill you, if you just lie down quietly!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah ha

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's Proba- Bly safer for you to lie down here, anyway

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Even if you can caught up with Jango, you're stillno match for him

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Even if I'm no match for him... I'll still protect them...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm the captain of USOPPP pirate group...!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm a brave warrior of the sea!!! I won't let you hurt the villagers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hehehehehehe!! Look at him, shouting out load in a weird style like that!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
